meta_title: For Founders: analytics setup to Solve tutorial hell (Advanced Idea List)
meta_description: Learn how to analytics setup and overcome tutorial hell. A Advanced-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Analytics Setup to Solve Tutorial Hell
content.seo_description: Stop drifting in tutorial hell. Learn how to implement a high-performance analytics stack using Antigravity and Claude Code to drive real SaaS revenue.
content.answer_block: Tutorial hell ends when you stop consuming and start measuring. By integrating event-driven analytics directly into your MVP, you force data-backed decision making. Use Antigravity for rapid architectural scaffolding and Claude Code for automated implementation, ensuring every user action is tracked, validated, and ready for growth-focused iteration.
content.intro:
You have spent weeks watching tutorials, yet your dashboard remains empty. The trap of 'tutorial hell' is not a lack of knowledge; it is a lack of feedback loops. You are building in the dark, hoping the market will eventually find you, rather than instrumenting your product to reveal exactly where your users drop off.

Real founders don't guess—they measure. By shifting your focus from 'learning to code' to 'engineering for insights,' you transform your MVP into a living organism. This guide leverages Antigravity and Claude Code to bypass the boilerplate and inject enterprise-grade analytics into your stack in minutes, not days.

steps.title: Define Your North Star Metric
steps.description: Before writing code, identify the single event that represents user value. We will use Antigravity to generate the schema for this event.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a JSON schema for a 'user_completed_onboarding' event that captures user_id, timestamp, session_duration, and conversion_source.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Create a new events.schema.json file in the root directory using the generated schema.'

steps.title: Bootstrap the Analytics Provider
steps.description: Initialize your analytics SDK integration point. We need a clean abstraction layer to avoid vendor lock-in.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create an analytics utility wrapper in TypeScript that supports PostHog or Segment, including error handling and event batching.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Initialize the analytics utility in src/lib/analytics.ts and export a trackEvent function.'

steps.title: Instrument Critical User Flows
steps.description: Identify the high-friction points in your onboarding and inject event triggers.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the existing auth flow and suggest where to place trackEvent('signup_started') and trackEvent('signup_completed') calls.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Inject trackEvent calls into the auth controller at the start and end of the registration process.'

steps.title: Automate Server-Side Tracking
steps.description: Client-side events are flaky. We need to mirror critical events on the server for data integrity.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a middleware function that intercepts API responses and fires server-side analytics events for successful transactions.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Apply the analytics middleware to the /api/checkout route.'

steps.title: Validate Data Pipeline
steps.description: Verify that events are flowing from your local environment to your dashboard.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a test script that triggers 50 mock events to simulate a user session and validates the payload structure.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Execute the test script and verify events appear in the analytics console.'

pro_tips: Never track everything. Focus exclusively on events that directly correlate to MRR or churn reduction.
Always use a server-side proxy for analytics to bypass AdBlockers and ensure 100% data capture.
Implement 'User Identity' as early as possible to stitch sessions across devices before the user creates an account.
Use feature flags in tandem with analytics to run A/B tests on your landing page conversion rates.
Set up automated alerts for significant drops in your North Star metric to catch bugs before they kill your growth.
content.next_steps: Once your analytics are live, map your user funnel in a spreadsheet. Identify the step with the highest drop-off rate and dedicate your next development sprint to optimizing that specific screen.
content.conversion_block: Stop building for the void. Start building for the metrics that drive a sustainable, profitable business. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
